creator: pneumann@gmail.com
text:
www.gnome-look.org seem to have change the place of some of their themes..

Its probable that some gnome-look themes would need to do change MASTER_SITES from:
     http://www.gnome-look.org/content/files/
to 
     http://www.gnome-look.org/CONTENT


* update MASTER_SITES
* use version 0.3...
